name: Viking Kagit ve Seluloz A.S.
summary: Viking Kagit ve Sel√É¬ºloz A.S. produces and sells papers for the cleaning paper industry in Turkey. The company offers toilet papers, paper towels, napkins, facial tissues, wet towels, dispensers, and other products under the Premia, Lily, Senso, Select, and Pufla brands. It also exports its products to 23 countries, primarily to the Europe and Central Asian Republics. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Viking Kagit ve Sel√É¬ºloz A.S. is a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.
